data.title: QXO plans $750 million common stock offering with potential additional $112.5 million, listed on NYSE as "QXO."
data.description: QXO, Inc. revealed plans for an Offering to issue $750 million worth of its common stock listed on NYSE under "QXO." The underwriter may purchase an extra $112.5 million at the public offering price after discounts.

data.title: Ethereum's user base grows as activity spikes: 8M addresses in use, hitting record 2.8M daily transactions, driven by stablecoin surge.
data.description: In the span of a month, the number of addresses actively engaging with Ethereum surged, reaching 8 million, which marks almost a twofold increase. At the same time, daily transactions on the platform skyrocketed to a record-breaking 2.8 million. This notable boost in activity coincided with a significant rise in the utilization of stablecoins within the Ethereum network.

data.title: Crypto sentiment declines as Fear & Greed Index drops 12 points to "neutral" amid concerns over US market structure bill.
data.description: On Friday, the Crypto Fear & Greed Index dropped 12 points to reach a "neutral" level as concern heightened regarding the fate of a highly anticipated crypto bill in the United States.

data.title: Sandglass Capital receives $300M commitment from Moody Aldrich Partners for emerging market special opportunities. Founded in 1988, MAP is based in Boston.
data.description: Moody Aldrich Partners (MAP), a private investment firm located in Boston, has recently pledged a substantial sum of US$300 million to funds overseen by Sandglass Capital, an investment company that focuses on emerging market special opportunities. Established in 1988, MAP’s commitment marks a significant investment in Sandglass Capital’s strategies to capitalize on emerging market prospects.

data.title: Tigo Energy and Weco certify MLPE-inverter compatibility, simplifying PV system design. Announcement covers Tigo Flex MLPE products and Weco hybrid solar inverters.
data.description: In Italy, Tigo Energy, Inc. (NASDAQ: TYGO) shared news of its recent agreement with Weco S.r.l., confirming compatibility between Tigo Flex MLPE products and Weco's hybrid solar inverters. This certificate covers specific single-phase and three-phase Weco products alongside selected members from Tigo's TS4-A and TS4-X product lines. This collaboration aims to enhance solar energy systems' efficiency by streamlining integration between the two companies' technologies.

data.title: Granite to lead $157 million project for 22nd Street Widening and Bridge Replacement in Tucson, funded by city, regional authority, and $25 million RAISE Grant.
data.description: Granite, partnering with Traylor Bros., Inc., has been chosen by the City of Tucson for the 22nd Street Widening and Bridge Replacement Project in Tucson, Arizona. This project, valued at $157 million, will be financed by the City of Tucson, the Regional Transportation Authority, and a $25 million RAISE Grant. It will be part of Granite's fourth-quarter CAP for 2025. The initiative involves the reconstruction of 22nd Street from Kino Parkw.

data.title: Franklin Street Properties Corp. announces tax composition of 2025 distributions. Shareholders advised to consult with personal tax advisors.
data.description: Franklin Street Properties Corp. (NYSE American: FSP) disclosed the tax breakdown of its 2025 distributions in Wakefield, Mass. Shareholders should seek advice from their tax advisors regarding the tax implications of FSP distributions. The Common Stock (CUSIP # 35471R106) for 2025 had a total distribution with figures as follows: Total Unrecaptured Section 2025 Ordinary, Qualified, and Capital Gains.
